name: hover-translate-extension
description: A lightweight cross-browser extension for placeholder hover and selection translation.

scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.build:chrome: tsc --noEmit && vite build --mode chrome && node scripts/write-manifest.mjs chrome
scripts.build:firefox: tsc --noEmit && vite build --mode firefox && node scripts/write-manifest.mjs firefox
scripts.build: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
